name: Steamed Fish with Young Ginger
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fish fillets; sole, red snapper or sea bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine lemon juice and minced ginger root in a bowl.
2. In a frying pan, combine vegetable and sesame oil over medium heat.
3. Add garlic to the pan and sauté until light brown.
4. Remove the garlic from the oil using a slotted spoon and stir into the lemon juice and ginger mixture.
5. Fry sesame seeds in the same pan until golden brown, then add them to the ginger mixture.
6. Stir in soy sauce.
7. Place fish fillets on banana leaves or aluminum foil and sprinkle with the prepared seasoning.
8. Steam for 20 minutes.
